title: Cancún, Quintana Roo — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Cancún, Quintana Roo: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Cancún is a city in Quintana Roo with a population of 1,028,338. World-famous Caribbean beach destination with turquoise waters, ancient Mayan ruins, and a vibrant tourism economy.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
